description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named facebook/redex/build_and_test that can be called as a reusable workflow. It should run on multiple jobs with different environments: a matrix of Linux GCC jobs on various Debian and Ubuntu OS versions, a build job on Debian with Clang from llvm.org in multiple versions, and a build job on Windows. Each job should check out the repository, install prerequisites, and use custom actions to prepare and set up the build and test environment.
